notes: v0.2.12: Distortion v3 — third rewrite. Single-stage asymmetric hard clip (+1.0/-0.7) for richer harmonics, peak envelope follower scales wet level to track dry input level (so timbre changes are perceived as timbre, not 'just louder'), cabinet LPF dropped 5kHz→4kHz to kill more aliasing. Default drive 15, default mix 85%. Plug your guitar in and try drive 15-25 for metal tones.
